title: A narrative review of fluorescence imaging in robotic-assisted surgery.
author: Lee YJ van den Berg NS Orosco RK Rosenthal EL Sorger JM
content: S-EPMC8452263 PMC8452263 A narrative review of fluorescence imaging in robotic-assisted surgery. In this review, we provide examples of applications of fluorescence imaging in urologic, gynecologic, general, and endocrine surgeries. While robotic-assisted surgery has helped increase
